headline: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY, RTYY, MUYY, TMYY, CWY, CRY and XEY
summary: New York, April 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GraniteShares today announced the weekly distributions for its GraniteShares YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY, RTYY, MUYY, TMYY, CWY, CRY and XEY as shown in the table below. ETF TickerETF NameDistribution FrequencyDistribution per ShareDistribution Rate1,330-Day SEC Yield2ROC4Ex-Date & Record Date5,6Payment Date7SEMYGraniteShares YieldBOOST SEM
